title: FINANCIAL EDUCATION CLASSES - 211info
text: TIGARD MULTI-SERVICE CENTER FINANCIAL EDUCATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of financial education classes covering topics such as understanding banking services, short- and long-term financial planning and stability, building and repairing credit, and understanding the basics of retirement planning. All classes are online through Zoom. 11515 SW Durham Road Suite E8 Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Visit website for current class schedule. Email (503) 726-0823 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (503) 726-0823 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 94 Services: Financial Literacy Training Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START HOUSING/SHELTER - COMMUNITY CONNECT HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING REPAIR ASSISTANCE FOR BEAVERTON RESIDENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION AND ENERGY CONSERVATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOUSING FAMILY ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES MATERIAL GOODS - SENIOR PORTABLE AC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
